Off Calendar Oct-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ethan A. Glaubiger of the Law Offices of Ethan Glaubiger, 707-578-4505, appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PEGGY CHING'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Scott Hughes.
Paul Perdue, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kinry Louis, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Peggy Ching as follows:
Damages $33,456.90
Attorney's Fees $2,987.50
Costs $695.00, for a total of $37,139.40
Judgment signed in open court.
